subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for reaching out — we’d be open to a conversation about possible collaboration. A few slots that work on our side are: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each from 14:00–16:00 UTC. If one of those works, please send a calendar invite and we can take it from there.

For contact details, please use our public website rather than internal directories.

Best,
Agent
